workspace_hub.default_description: Open a work area and jump to the tools that belong together.
workspace_hub.switcher_subtitle: Keep the sidebar light, then open the area you want to work in.
workspace_hub.modules_subtitle: Each card takes you straight to the module.
workspace_hub.empty_body: This category becomes useful as soon as the matching modules are enabled for the workspace and role.

revenue.title: Revenue and customer pipeline
revenue.description: Customers, lead intake, quotes, orders, and sales in one place.

growth.title: Growth and retention
growth.description: Campaigns, loyalty, and performance views for acquisition and repeat business.

operations.title: Operations and delivery
operations.description: Jobs, tasks, bookings, planning, and team coordination for daily execution.

finance.title: Finance and approvals
finance.description: Invoices, expenses, accounting, and pending approvals with a cleaner finance flow.

catalog.title: Catalog and structure
catalog.description: Services, products, categories, and technical scans grouped in one product space.

workspace.title: Workspace settings
workspace.description: Company settings, billing, and account preferences without scattering them in the sidebar.

modules.customers: Customer records, notes, tags, and relationship history.
modules.requests: Lead intake, qualification, and conversion follow-up.
modules.orders: Product order intake and fulfillment tracking.
modules.campaigns: Audience lists, campaigns, automations, and runs.
modules.loyalty: Retention, VIP tiers, rewards, and repeat business tools.
modules.performance: Key performance views for owners and leads.
modules.jobs: Operational work orders and field execution flow.
modules.reservations: Bookings, queue, and service flow management.
modules.planning: Schedules, shifts, and pending time-off approvals.
modules.team: Team members, roles, and access management.
modules.invoices: Billing, sending, approval, and payment follow-up.
modules.expenses: Operational spend, receipts, reimbursement, and AI intake.
modules.accounting: Journal, taxes, periods, reviews, and exports.
modules.finance_approvals: Items waiting for finance validation before moving forward.
modules.tips_owner: Owner view for team tip reporting and exports.
modules.tips_member: Personal view for tips and earnings.
modules.services: Service catalog ready for quoting and booking.
modules.products: Products, prices, stock, and sellable catalog items.
modules.company_settings: Brand, finance, company, and workspace-level settings.
modules.billing: Plan, subscription, payment methods, and add-ons.
modules.profile: Personal profile, password, and account preferences.
